free_text: The 3.2 MV PELLETRON accelerator of the
research laboratory for nuclear reactors at the Tokyo
.Broad neutron spectrum measured by TOF method
detector 15.2 cm diameter by 20.3 cm was centered
in a 33.0 cm outer diameter by 35.6 cm NaI(TL) hollow
energy resolution is 7% at 0.662 MeV and time resolu-
tion is 4.0 ns for 0.511 MeV gamma. Spectrometer was
set at angle 125 degree with respect to the proton
Li-6 glass detector for neutron energy and
flux monitoring. 5 mm diameter * 5 mm length 6-Li
detector located 30 cm from neutron source was used
for 10-90 keV region, and 102 mm diameter * 6.4 mm
length detector located 460 cm from neutron source
.Gold sample for monitor, metallic, chemical purity
